If the querist touches the head, throat, hair, chin, frontal
bone, ear, shank and abdomen he must have eaten food mixed
with the flesh of elephant, buffalo, sheep, hog, cow, hare, deer and
buffalo respectively.
[We can say definitely that this verse is not by Varahamihira.
For, he never violates the metrical rule that in the 2iy1I the 6th
Gana must have either asnnn or ^0lir short syllables. Hence what
I have stated at the beginning of this chapter regarding the
authorship of this chapter stands confirmed.]
nfawn TOFT w feqewirt n^xti
When an evil omen is seen or heard, the astrologer should
state that the querist has eaten the flesh of alligators or fish. In the
same manner, the prediction of abortion should be made at a query
regarding a pregnant woman, i.e. if there arc evil omens at the
time of consultation, miscarriage has to be predicted.
[Gf.
